title: Shadowstrike
description: Dark core-shader pack made for PvP clarity.
body:
## 🖤 SHADOWSTRIKE – Dark PvP Core Shader Pack

SHADOWSTRIKE is a PvP-focused core-shader resource pack that makes Minecraft darker and cleaner so players are easier to see.  
The world fades into the background while enemies stand out clearly, helping you stay focused during fights.

It keeps everything simple, smooth, and fast — no glow effects, no fancy visuals, just pure PvP clarity.

---

### ✨ What this pack does

- Darkens the world to reduce visual noise  
- Boosts contrast so blocks and edges are easier to read  
- Makes players, mobs, and important items brighter  
- Keeps textures clear without glow or bloom  
- Helps you spot enemies faster in PvP  

---

### 🎮 Works on

- **Minecraft 1.21+**
- Vanilla client (core shaders only)  
- Works great with Sodium  
  *(use Sodium Core Shader Support)*  
https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-core-shader-support

---

### 📥 How to use

- Download the pack  
- Put it in your `resourcepacks` folder  
- Enable it in-game  
- Jump into PvP and focus on the fight  

---

### 🎯 Best for

- Duels and tournaments  
- Competitive PvP servers  
- Players who want less distraction  
- Fast and clean gameplay
